headline: Strong open anchored to discovery, then it drifted into a feature tour and ended on a soft 'I'll send the deck'.
deal_vs_process_note: The buyer is engaged and pulling for value ('which of these actually moves my DSO?') — this is a real deal with a weak close, not a dead one. Lock a dated next step tied to their numbers and the demo converts.
coaching_theme: Close on a dated commitment, not a deck. When Sam said the value needs to be 'tied to our numbers,' the move was: 'Let's put 30 minutes on the calendar Thursday with Dana to model this against your over-60 figures.' Replace 'reconnect' with a date and a name.

items.name: Anchored to prior discovery
items.rationale: Opened by quoting the buyer's exact discovery pain and Dana's frustration.

items.name: Tell-Show-Tell structure
items.cite_quote: Context: this is your over-60 bucket
items.rationale: Clean Context→Capability→Impact arc on the first capability.

items.name: Customized data (logo, realistic numbers)
items.rationale: Used the buyer's bucket but no logo or realistic prospect numbers on screen.

items.name: Interactive checkpoints (every 5–7 min)
items.cite_quote: Is this how your team triages today
items.rationale: Good checkpoint that surfaced a real workflow insight.

items.name: ROI moment tied to buyer-named outcome
items.cite_quote: Most teams pull DSO down a week or two
items.rationale: ROI was vendor-generic ('most teams'), not tied to a buyer-stated number — caps at 3.

items.name: Objection invitation (proactive)
items.cite_quote: Which of these actually moves my DSO?
items.rationale: Objection was buyer-initiated; rep never proactively invited one.

items.name: Pricing timing (40–49 min, 3–4 mentions)
items.rationale: Pricing never raised at any point in the call.

items.name: Talk ratio 55–65% rep
items.cite_quote: Let me show you the dashboard
items.rationale: Rep-led as expected for a demo, with one feature-dump stretch.

items.name: Firm future commit
items.rationale: Ended on 'send the deck' and 'reconnect' — no date, no attendees, no commit.
